CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Asset__c )) , leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__Analysis_Code__c , IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Entity__c)) , leaseworks__Entity__r.leaseworks__Analysis_Code__c , IF(NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Operator_New__c )), leaseworks__Operator_New__r.leaseworks__Analysis_Code__c , IF(NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Lease__c )), leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Analysis_Code__c , IF(NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Bank_Account__c )), leaseworks__Bank_Account__r.leaseworks__Analysis_Code__c , Name) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Analysis Code
